if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND t.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdDlivTmplt :: selectById */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , vnd.vendor_nm AS vendor_nm , cd_dm.code_label AS dliv_method_cd_nm , cd_dpt.code_label AS dliv_pay_type_cd_nm FROM pd_dliv_tmplt t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_vendor vnd ON vnd.vendor_id = t.vendor_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dm ON cd_dm.code_grp = 'DLIV_METHOD' AND cd_dm.code_value = t.dliv_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dpt ON cd_dpt.code_grp = 'DLIV_PAY_TYPE' AND cd_dpt.code_value = t.dliv_pay_type_cd WHERE t.dliv_tmplt_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdDlivTmplt :: selectList */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , vnd.vendor_nm AS vendor_nm , cd_dm.code_label AS dliv_method_cd_nm , cd_dpt.code_label AS dliv_pay_type_cd_nm FROM pd_dliv_tmplt t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_vendor vnd ON vnd.vendor_id = t.vendor_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dm ON cd_dm.code_grp = 'DLIV_METHOD' AND cd_dm.code_value = t.dliv_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dpt ON cd_dpt.code_grp = 'DLIV_PAY_TYPE' AND cd_dpt.code_value = t.dliv_pay_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdDlivTmplt :: selectPageList */ t.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , vnd.vendor_nm AS vendor_nm , cd_dm.code_label AS dliv_method_cd_nm , cd_dpt.code_label AS dliv_pay_type_cd_nm FROM pd_dliv_tmplt t LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = t.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_vendor vnd ON vnd.vendor_id = t.vendor_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dm ON cd_dm.code_grp = 'DLIV_METHOD' AND cd_dm.code_value = t.dliv_method_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dpt ON cd_dpt.code_grp = 'DLIV_PAY_TYPE' AND cd_dpt.code_value = t.dliv_pay_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(t.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdDlivTmplt :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_dliv_tmplt t
